steps: Go to https://dash.cloudflare.com and log in or create a free account
Click your user icon in the top right, then select 'My Profile'
Click 'API Tokens' in the left sidebar
Choose a template (e.g., 'Edit zone DNS') or select 'Create Custom Token'
Configure the permissions and zone/account scope for your token
Copy the token — it is shown only once

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Token
credential_fields.description: Your Cloudflare API Token (scoped to specific permissions)

notes: Use scoped API Tokens (not the Global API Key) for better security
Tokens can be scoped to specific zones, accounts, and permissions
The token is sent as: Authorization: Bearer <token>
Free Cloudflare accounts can create up to 10 API tokens
Token is shown only once — store it securely immediately after creation

test_endpoint.description: Verify the API token is valid and active
